mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT a.id , a.site_code siteCode, a.order_no orderNo, a.agent_id agentId, a.agent_account agentAccount, a.device_type deviceType, a.status , a.customer_status customerStatus, a.fee_amount as feeAmount, a.arrive_amount as arriveAmount, a.apply_ip applyIp, a.apply_amount applyAmount, a.deposit_withdraw_type_id depositWithdrawTypeId, a.deposit_withdraw_type_code depositWithdrawTypeCode, a.deposit_withdraw_way_id depositWithdrawWayId, a.deposit_withdraw_way depositWithdrawWay, a.currency_code currencyCode, a.deposit_withdraw_address AS depositWithdrawAddress, a.trade_currency_amount tradeCurrencyAmount, a.exchange_rate exchangeRate, a.is_big_money isBigMoney, a.is_first_out isFirstOut, a.created_time createdTime, a.updated_time updatedTime, a.remark, a.cpf cpf FROM agent_deposit_withdrawal a left join agent_deposit_withdrawal_audit udw on a.order_no = udw.order_no AND a.type = 2 and a.site_code = #{vo.siteCode} AND a.created_time >= #{vo.applyTimeStart} AND a.created_time <= #{vo.applyTimeEnd} AND a.order_no = #{vo.orderNo} AND a.agent_account = #{vo.agentAccount} AND a.status = #{vo.status} AND a.deposit_withdraw_address = #{vo.depositWithdrawAddress} and udw.audit_user = #{vo.auditId} AND udw.audit_time >= #{vo.auditTimeStart} AND udw.audit_time <= #{vo.auditTimeEnd} and a.currency_code = #{vo.currencyCode} ORDER BY a.created_time DESC

SELECT count(DISTINCT a.id) FROM agent_deposit_withdrawal a left join user_deposit_withdrawal_audit udw on a.order_no = udw.order_no AND a.type = 2 and a.site_code = #{vo.siteCode} AND a.updated_time >= #{vo.applyTimeEnd} AND a.updated_time <= #{vo.applyTimeEnd} AND a.order_no = #{vo.orderNo} AND a.agentAccount = #{vo.agentAccount} AND a.status = #{vo.status} and udw.audit_user = #{vo.auditId} AND udw.audit_time >= #{vo.auditTimeStart} AND a.audit_time <= #{vo.auditTimeEnd}

SELECT DISTINCT a.id , a.site_code siteCode, a.order_no orderNo, a.agent_id agentId, a.agent_account agentAccount, a.device_type deviceType, a.status , a.customer_status customerStatus, a.apply_ip applyIp, a.apply_amount applyAmount, a.deposit_withdraw_type_id depositWithdrawType, a.deposit_withdraw_type_code depositWithdrawTypeCode, a.deposit_withdraw_way_id depositWithdrawWayId, a.deposit_withdraw_way depositWithdrawWay, a.currency_code currencyCode, a.deposit_withdraw_address AS depositWithdrawAddress, a.trade_currency_amount tradeCurrencyAmount, a.exchange_rate exchangeRate, a.is_big_money isBigMoney, a.is_first_out isFirstOut, a.created_time createdTime, a.updated_time updatedTime, a.remark, a.locker, a.lock_status lockStatus, a.lock_time lockTime, a.cpf cpf IF(a.locker = #{vo.operator}, -1, 1) lockStatus1, a.pay_process_status payProcessStatus FROM agent_deposit_withdrawal a left join agent_deposit_withdrawal_audit adwa on a.order_no = adwa.order_no AND a.type = 2 and a.review_operation = #{vo.reviewOperation} and a.site_code =#{vo.siteCode} AND a.created_time >= #{vo.applyTimeStart} AND a.created_time <= #{vo.applyTimeEnd} AND adwa.audit_time >= #{vo.auditTimeStart} AND adwa.audit_time <= #{vo.auditTimeEnd} AND a.agent_account = #{vo.agentAccount} AND a.order_no = #{vo.orderNo} AND a.lock_status = #{vo.lockStatus} AND a.locker = #{vo.auditUser} and a.currency_code = #{vo.currencyCode} ORDER BY a.lock_status desc ,lockStatus1 ASC, a.created_time ASC

SELECT a.id , a.site_code siteCode, a.order_no orderNo, a.agent_id agentId, a.agent_account agentAccount, a.device_type deviceType, a.device_no deviceNo , a.status , a.customer_status customerStatus, a.apply_ip applyIp, a.apply_amount applyAmount, a.arrive_amount arriveAmount, a.fee_amount feeAmount, a.deposit_withdraw_type_id depositWithdrawType, a.deposit_withdraw_type_code depositWithdrawTypeCode, a.deposit_withdraw_way_id depositWithdrawWayId, a.deposit_withdraw_way depositWithdrawWay, b.network_type networkType, a.currency_code currencyCode, a.trade_currency_amount tradeCurrencyAmount, a.exchange_rate exchangeRate, a.is_big_money isBigMoney, a.is_first_out isFirstOut, a.created_time createdTime, a.updated_time updatedTime, a.remark, a.locker, a.lock_status lockStatus, a.lock_time lockTime, IF(a.locker = #{vo.operator}, -1, 1) lockStatus1, IF(a.lock_status = 0, 1, 2) reviewOperation, a.pay_process_status payProcessStatus, a.deposit_withdraw_address AS depositWithdrawAddress, a.recv_user_name recvUserName, a.recv_bank_code recvBankCode, a.recv_bank_name recvBankName, a.recv_bank_branch recvBankBranch, a.recv_bank_account recvBankAccount, a.recv_qr_code recvQrCode, a.file_key as fileKey, a.cash_flow_file as cashFlowFile, a.pay_tx_id payTxId, a.platform_currency_exchange_rate platformCurrencyExchangeRate, a.way_fee_amount wayFeeAmount, a.settlement_fee_amount settlementFeeAmount, a.coin_code coinCode FROM agent_deposit_withdrawal a left join system_recharge_way b on a.deposit_withdraw_way_id=b.id and a.type = 1 and deposit_withdraw_channel_type='SITE_CUSTOM' and a.status=21 and a.site_code =#{vo.siteCode} AND a.created_time >= #{vo.applyTimeStart} AND a.created_time <= #{vo.applyTimeEnd} AND a.agent_account = #{vo.agentAccount} AND a.order_no = #{vo.orderNo} AND a.lock_status = #{vo.lockStatus} AND a.locker = #{vo.auditUser} and a.currency_code = #{vo.currencyCode} AND a.deposit_withdraw_way_id = #{vo.depositWithdrawWayId} ORDER BY a.lock_status desc ,lockStatus1 ASC, a.created_time desc

SELECT count(0) FROM agent_deposit_withdrawal a and a.type = 1 and deposit_withdraw_channel_type='SITE_CUSTOM' and a.status=21 and a.site_code =#{vo.siteCode} AND a.created_time >= #{vo.applyTimeStart} AND a.created_time <= #{vo.applyTimeEnd} AND a.agent_account = #{vo.agentAccount} AND a.order_no = #{vo.orderNo} AND a.lock_status = #{vo.lockStatus} AND a.locker = #{vo.auditUser} and a.currency_code = #{vo.currencyCode} AND a.deposit_withdraw_way_id = #{vo.depositWithdrawWayId}
mapper.sql: where a.type = 1 and a.site_code = #{vo.siteCode} AND a.created_time >= #{vo.orderStartTime} AND a.created_time <= #{vo.orderEndTime} AND a.order_no = #{vo.orderNo} AND a.agent_account = #{vo.agentAccount} AND a.device_type = #{vo.deviceType} and a.status in (4,5) AND a.status = #{vo.status} AND a.apply_ip = #{vo.applyIp} AND a.deposit_withdraw_type = #{vo.depositCoinType}
mapper.select: SELECT a.order_no orderNo, a.agent_account agentAccount, a.device_type deviceType, a.status status, a.customer_status customerStatus, a.apply_ip applyIp, a.apply_amount applyAmount, a.deposit_withdraw_type depositWithdrawType, a.deposit_withdraw_method depositWithdrawMethod, a.currency_code currencyCode, a.trade_currency_amount tradeCurrencyAmount, a.exchange_rate exchangeRate, a.arrive_amount arriveAmount, a.created_time createdTime, a.remark remark FROM agent_deposit_withdrawal a ORDER BY a.created_time asc ORDER BY a.created_time desc ORDER BY a.created_time DESC, a.arrive_amount DESC
SELECT count(1) FROM agent_deposit_withdrawal a

SELECT a.agent_account AS agentAccount, a.type AS type, a.arrive_amount arriveAmount, a.apply_amount AS applyAmount, a.is_big_money AS isBigMoney FROM agent_deposit_withdrawal a WHERE a.status = 101 and site_code =#{siteCode} AND a.agent_account IN #{value}
SELECT * FROM agent_deposit_withdrawal WHERE `type` = 1 and site_code = #{siteCode} AND agent_id = #{agentId} ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM agent_deposit_withdrawal WHERE `type` = 1 AND agent_id = #{agentId} ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM agent_deposit_withdrawal WHERE `type` = 2 AND agent_id = #{agentId} AND deposit_withdraw_way_id = #{withdrawWayId} AND status = '101' ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT a.id , a.site_code siteCode, a.order_no orderNo, a.agent_id agentId, a.agent_account agentAccount, a.device_type deviceType, a.status , a.customer_status customerStatus, a.apply_ip applyIp, a.apply_amount applyAmount, a.deposit_withdraw_type_id depositWithdrawType, a.deposit_withdraw_type_code depositWithdrawTypeCode, a.deposit_withdraw_way_id depositWithdrawWayId, a.deposit_withdraw_way depositWithdrawWay, a.deposit_withdraw_channel_code depositWithdrawChannelCode, a.deposit_withdraw_channel_name depositWithdrawChannelName, a.deposit_withdraw_channel_type depositWithdrawChannelType, a.currency_code currencyCode, a.trade_currency_amount tradeCurrencyAmount, a.arrive_amount as arriveAmount, a.fee_amount as feeAmount, a.exchange_rate exchangeRate, a.is_big_money isBigMoney, a.is_first_out isFirstOut, a.created_time createdTime, a.updated_time updatedTime, a.pay_audit_user as payAuditUser, a.pay_audit_time AS payAuditTime, a.remark, a.locker, a.lock_status lockStatus, a.lock_time lockTime, a.collect_info as collectInfo, a.pay_process_status payProcessStatus, a.account_type accountType, a.account_branch accountBranch, a.deposit_withdraw_address depositWithdrawAddress, a.deposit_withdraw_name depositWithdrawName, a.deposit_withdraw_surname depositWithdrawSurname, a.area_code areaCode, a.telephone, a.email, a.address, a.province, a.city, a.postal_code postalCode, a.country, a.device_no deviceNo, a.recharge_withdraw_time_consuming as rechargeWithdrawTimeConsuming, a.ifsc_code ifscCode FROM agent_deposit_withdrawal a left join agent_deposit_withdrawal_audit adwa on a.order_no = adwa.order_no AND a.type = 2 and a.site_code = #{vo.siteCode} and a.review_operation = #{vo.reviewOperation} AND a.created_time >= #{vo.applyTimeStart} AND a.created_time <= #{vo.applyTimeEnd} AND adwa.audit_time >= #{vo.auditTimeStart} AND adwa.audit_time <= #{vo.auditTimeEnd} AND a.order_no = #{vo.orderNo} AND a.agent_account = #{vo.agentAccount} and a.device_type = #{vo.deviceType} and a.status = #{vo.status} and a.customer_status = #{vo.customerStatus} and a.currency_code = #{vo.currencyCode} AND a.deposit_withdraw_way_id IN #{item} and a.deposit_withdraw_channel_name = #{vo.depositWithdrawChannelName} and a.is_big_money = #{vo.isBigMoney} and a.is_first_out = #{vo.isFirstOut} order by a.pay_audit_time asc order by a.pay_audit_time desc order by a.created_time desc

SELECT DISTINCT a.id , a.site_code siteCode, a.order_no orderNo, a.agent_id agentId, a.agent_account agentAccount, a.device_type deviceType, a.status , a.review_operation as reviewOperation, a.customer_status customerStatus, a.apply_ip applyIp, a.apply_amount applyAmount, a.arrive_amount arriveAmount, a.deposit_withdraw_type_id depositWithdrawType, a.deposit_withdraw_type_code depositWithdrawTypeCode, a.deposit_withdraw_way_id depositWithdrawWayId, a.deposit_withdraw_way depositWithdrawWay, a.deposit_withdraw_channel_code depositWithdrawChannelCode, a.deposit_withdraw_channel_name depositWithdrawChannelName, a.deposit_withdraw_channel_type depositWithdrawChannelType, a.currency_code currencyCode, a.trade_currency_amount tradeCurrencyAmount, a.exchange_rate exchangeRate, a.is_big_money isBigMoney, a.is_first_out isFirstOut, a.created_time createdTime, a.updated_time updatedTime, a.remark, a.locker, a.lock_status lockStatus, a.lock_time lockTime, a.collect_info as collectInfo, a.pay_process_status payProcessStatus, a.account_type accountType, a.account_branch accountBranch, a.deposit_withdraw_address depositWithdrawAddress, a.deposit_withdraw_name depositWithdrawName, a.deposit_withdraw_surname depositWithdrawSurname, a.area_code areaCode, a.telephone, a.email, a.address, a.province, a.city, a.postal_code postalCode, a.country FROM agent_deposit_withdrawal a left join agent_deposit_withdrawal_audit adwa on a.order_no = adwa.order_no AND a.type = 2 and a.site_code = #{vo.siteCode} and a.review_operation = #{vo.reviewOperation} AND a.created_time >= #{vo.applyTimeStart} AND a.created_time <= #{vo.applyTimeEnd} AND adwa.audit_time >= #{vo.auditTimeStart} AND adwa.audit_time <= #{vo.auditTimeEnd} AND a.order_no = #{vo.orderNo} AND a.agent_account = #{vo.agentAccount} and a.device_type = #{vo.deviceType} and a.status = #{vo.status} and a.customer_status = #{vo.customerStatus} and a.currency_code = #{vo.currencyCode} and a.deposit_withdraw_way_id = #{vo.depositWithdrawWayId} and a.deposit_withdraw_channel_name = #{vo.depositWithdrawChannelName} and a.is_big_money = #{vo.isBigMoney} and a.is_first_out = #{vo.isFirstOut} ORDER BY a.lock_status ASC, a.created_time ASC

SELECT DISTINCT a.id , a.site_code siteCode, a.order_no orderNo, a.agent_id agentId, a.agent_account agentAccount, a.device_type deviceType, a.status , a.customer_status customerStatus, a.apply_ip applyIp, a.apply_amount applyAmount, a.arrive_amount arriveAmount, a.fee_amount feeAmount, a.deposit_withdraw_type_id depositWithdrawType, a.deposit_withdraw_type_code depositWithdrawTypeCode, a.deposit_withdraw_way_id depositWithdrawWayId, a.deposit_withdraw_way depositWithdrawWay, a.deposit_withdraw_channel_code depositWithdrawChannelCode, a.deposit_withdraw_channel_name depositWithdrawChannelName, a.deposit_withdraw_channel_type depositWithdrawChannelType, a.currency_code currencyCode, a.trade_currency_amount tradeCurrencyAmount, a.exchange_rate exchangeRate, a.is_big_money isBigMoney, a.is_first_out isFirstOut, a.created_time createdTime, a.updated_time updatedTime, a.remark, a.locker, a.lock_status lockStatus, a.lock_time lockTime, a.collect_info as collectInfo, a.pay_process_status payProcessStatus, a.account_type accountType, a.account_branch accountBranch, a.deposit_withdraw_address depositWithdrawAddress, a.deposit_withdraw_name depositWithdrawName, a.deposit_withdraw_surname depositWithdrawSurname, a.area_code areaCode, a.telephone, a.email, a.address, a.province, a.city, a.postal_code postalCode, a.country FROM agent_deposit_withdrawal a left join agent_deposit_withdrawal_audit adwa on a.order_no = adwa.order_no AND a.type = 2 and a.site_code = #{vo.siteCode} and a.review_operation = #{vo.reviewOperation} AND a.created_time >= #{vo.applyTimeStart} AND a.created_time <= #{vo.applyTimeEnd} AND adwa.audit_time >= #{vo.auditTimeStart} AND adwa.audit_time <= #{vo.auditTimeEnd} AND a.order_no = #{vo.orderNo} AND a.agent_account = #{vo.agentAccount} and a.device_type = #{vo.deviceType} and a.status = #{vo.status} and a.customer_status = #{vo.customerStatus} and a.currency_code = #{vo.currencyCode} and a.deposit_withdraw_way_id = #{vo.depositWithdrawWayId} and a.deposit_withdraw_channel_name = #{vo.depositWithdrawChannelName} and a.is_big_money = #{vo.isBigMoney} and a.is_first_out = #{vo.isFirstOut} ORDER BY a.lock_status ASC, a.created_time ASC

SELECT count(DISTINCT a.id) FROM agent_deposit_withdrawal a left join agent_deposit_withdrawal_audit adwa on a.order_no = adwa.order_no AND a.type = 2 and a.site_code = #{vo.siteCode} and a.review_operation = #{vo.reviewOperation} AND a.created_time >= #{vo.applyTimeStart} AND a.created_time <= #{vo.applyTimeEnd} AND adwa.audit_time >= #{vo.auditTimeStart} AND adwa.audit_time <= #{vo.auditTimeEnd} AND a.order_no = #{vo.orderNo} AND a.agent_account = #{vo.agentAccount} and a.device_type = #{vo.deviceType} and a.status = #{vo.status} and a.customer_status = #{vo.customerStatus} and a.currency_code = #{vo.currencyCode} AND a.deposit_withdraw_way_id IN #{item} and a.deposit_withdraw_channel_name = #{vo.depositWithdrawChannelName} and a.is_big_money = #{vo.isBigMoney} and a.is_first_out = #{vo.isFirstOut} ORDER BY a.lock_status ASC, a.created_time ASC

SELECT count(1) FROM agent_deposit_withdrawal a left join user_deposit_withdrawal_audit udw on a.order_no = udw.order_no AND a.type = 2 and a.site_code = #{vo.siteCode} AND a.updated_time >= #{vo.applyTimeStart} AND a.updated_time <= #{vo.applyTimeEnd} AND a.order_no = #{vo.orderNo} AND a.agentAccount = #{vo.agentAccount} AND a.status = #{vo.status} and udw.audit_user = #{vo.auditId} AND udw.audit_time >= #{vo.auditTimeStart} AND a.audit_time <= #{vo.auditTimeEnd} ORDER BY a.created_time DESC

SELECT sum(way_fee_amount) as wayFeeAmount, sum(settlement_fee_amount) as settleFeeAmount, currency_code as currencyCode FROM `agent_deposit_withdrawal` WHERE status = #{vo.status} AND agent_id IN #{value} and updated_time >= #{vo.startTime} and updated_time <= #{vo.endTime} group by currency_code

SELECT * FROM (SELECT udw.order_no AS orderNo, udw.created_time AS tradeTime, udw.apply_amount AS tradeAmount, udw.arrive_amount AS arriveAmount, udw.customer_status AS tradeStatus, udw.currency_code AS currencyCode, CASE WHEN udw.deposit_withdraw_type_code = 'bank_card' THEN 'bank_card_recharge' WHEN udw.deposit_withdraw_type_code = 'electronic_wallet' THEN 'electronic_wallet_recharge' WHEN udw.deposit_withdraw_type_code = 'crypto_currency' THEN 'crypto_currency_recharge' ELSE '' END AS tradeWayType, udw.deposit_withdraw_address AS tradeAccount, udw.account_branch AS tradeNetWorkType, '0' AS exchangeRate, udw.recv_user_name AS recvUserName, udw.recv_bank_code AS recvBankCode, udw.recv_bank_name AS recvBankName, udw.recv_bank_branch AS recvBankBranch, udw.recv_bank_account AS recvBankAccount, udw.recv_qr_code AS recvQrCode FROM agent_deposit_withdrawal udw WHERE udw.agent_id = #{vo.agentId} AND udw.type = 1 AND udw.created_time >= #{vo.startTime} AND udw.created_time <= #{vo.endTime} UNION ALL SELECT umdr.order_no AS orderNo, umdr.created_time AS tradeTime, umdr.adjust_amount AS tradeAmount, umdr.adjust_amount AS arriveAmount, IF(umdr.balance_change_status = '0','2','1') AS tradeStatus, 'WTC' AS currencyCode, 'manual_up' AS tradeWayType, '' AS tradeAccount, '' AS tradeNetWorkType, '0' AS exchangeRate, '' AS recvUserName, '' AS recvBankCode, '' AS recvBankName, '' AS recvBankBranch, '' AS recvBankAccount, '' AS recvQrCode FROM agent_manual_up_down_record umdr WHERE umdr.agent_id = #{vo.agentId} AND umdr.adjust_way = 1 AND umdr.adjust_type = 1 AND umdr.order_status = 3 AND umdr.created_time >= #{vo.startTime} AND umdr.created_time <= #{vo.endTime} ) tradeRecord WHERE 1=1 AND tradeRecord.tradeStatus = #{vo.customerStatus} AND tradeRecord.currencyCode = #{vo.currencyCode} ORDER BY tradeRecord.tradeTime DESC

SELECT * FROM (SELECT udw.order_no AS orderNo, udw.created_time AS tradeTime, udw.apply_amount AS tradeAmount, udw.arrive_amount AS arriveAmount, udw.customer_status AS tradeStatus, udw.currency_code AS currencyCode, CASE WHEN udw.deposit_withdraw_type_code = 'bank_card' THEN 'bank_card_withdraw' WHEN udw.deposit_withdraw_type_code = 'electronic_wallet' THEN 'electronic_wallet_withdraw' WHEN udw.deposit_withdraw_type_code = 'crypto_currency' THEN 'crypto_currency_withdraw' WHEN udw.deposit_withdraw_type_code = 'manual_withdraw' THEN 'manual_withdraw' ELSE '' END AS tradeWayType, udw.deposit_withdraw_address AS tradeAccount, udw.account_branch AS tradeNetWorkType, '0' AS exchangeRate FROM agent_deposit_withdrawal udw WHERE udw.agent_id = #{vo.agentId} AND udw.type = 2 AND udw.created_time >= #{vo.startTime} AND udw.created_time <= #{vo.endTime} UNION ALL SELECT umdr.order_no AS orderNo, umdr.created_time AS tradeTime, umdr.adjust_amount AS tradeAmount, umdr.adjust_amount AS arriveAmount, IF(umdr.balance_change_status = '0','2','1') AS tradeStatus, 'WTC' AS currencyCode, 'manual_down' AS tradeWayType, '' AS tradeAccount, '' AS tradeNetWorkType, '0' AS exchangeRate FROM agent_manual_up_down_record umdr WHERE umdr.agent_id = #{vo.agentId} AND umdr.adjust_way = 2 AND umdr.adjust_type = 1 AND umdr.order_status = 3 AND umdr.created_time >= #{vo.startTime} AND umdr.created_time <= #{vo.endTime} ) tradeRecord WHERE 1=1 AND tradeRecord.tradeStatus = #{vo.customerStatus} AND tradeRecord.currencyCode = #{vo.currencyCode} ORDER BY tradeRecord.tradeTime DESC

SELECT type as type, sum(way_fee_amount) as wayFeeAmount, currency_code as currencyCode FROM `agent_deposit_withdrawal` WHERE status = #{vo.status} AND agent_id IN #{value} and updated_time >= #{vo.startTime} and updated_time <= #{vo.endTime} group by type, currency_code

SELECT agent_id AS agentId, currency_code AS currency, SUM(IF(type = 1, arrive_amount, 0)) AS rechargeAmount, SUM(IF(type = 2, arrive_amount, 0)) AS withdrawAmount, SUM(IF(type = 1, apply_amount, 0)) AS fiatRechargeAmount, SUM(IF(type = 2, apply_amount, 0)) AS fiatWithdrawAmount, SUM(settlement_fee_amount) AS settlementFeeAmount FROM agent_deposit_withdrawal where site_code = #{vo.siteCode} AND agent_id IN #{value} and updated_time >= #{vo.startTime} and updated_time <= #{vo.endTime} and currency_code = #{vo.currency} and status = #{vo.status} GROUP BY agent_id,currency_code

SELECT agent_id AS agentId, currency_code AS currency, deposit_withdraw_way_id AS depositWithdrawWayId, SUM(IF(type = 1, arrive_amount, 0)) AS rechargeAmount, SUM(IF(type = 2, arrive_amount, 0)) AS withdrawAmount, SUM(IF(type = 1, apply_amount, 0)) AS fiatRechargeAmount, SUM(IF(type = 2, apply_amount, 0)) AS fiatWithdrawAmount, SUM(settlement_fee_amount) AS settlementFeeAmount FROM agent_deposit_withdrawal where site_code = #{vo.siteCode} AND agent_id IN #{value} and updated_time >= #{vo.startTime} and updated_time <= #{vo.endTime} and status = #{vo.status} and currency_code = #{vo.currency} and type = #{vo.type} GROUP BY agent_id,currency_code,deposit_withdraw_way_id

SELECT currency currencyCode, SUM(coin_amount) applyAmount FROM agent_coin_record WHERE site_code = #{vo.siteCode} and business_coin_type = #{vo.depositOrWithDraw} and balance_type = 2 and balance_type = 1 and created_time >= #{vo.startTime} and created_time <= #{vo.endTime} and currency = #{vo.currencyCode} GROUP BY currency;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT agent_id) agentCount FROM agent_coin_record WHERE site_code = #{vo.siteCode} and business_coin_type = #{vo.depositOrWithDraw} and balance_type = 2 and balance_type = 1 and created_time >= #{vo.startTime} and created_time <= #{vo.endTime}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT agent_account AS agentAccount, min( created_time ) AS firstUsedTime, max( created_time ) AS lastUsedTime , COUNT( id ) AS usedNums, ANY_VALUE(currency_code) AS currencyCode FROM agent_deposit_withdrawal WHERE deposit_withdraw_address = #{vo.depositWithdrawAddress} AND site_code = #{vo.siteCode} AND id != #{vo.id} GROUP BY agent_account) a ORDER BY a.lastUsedTime DESC

SELECT a.id , a.site_code siteCode, a.order_no orderNo, a.agent_id agentId, a.agent_account agentAccount, a.device_type deviceType, a.device_no deviceNo , a.status , a.customer_status customerStatus, a.apply_ip applyIp, a.apply_amount applyAmount, a.arrive_amount arriveAmount, a.fee_amount feeAmount, a.deposit_withdraw_type_id depositWithdrawType, a.deposit_withdraw_type_code depositWithdrawTypeCode, a.deposit_withdraw_way_id depositWithdrawWayId, a.deposit_withdraw_way depositWithdrawWay, b.network_type networkType, a.currency_code currencyCode, a.trade_currency_amount tradeCurrencyAmount, a.exchange_rate exchangeRate, a.is_big_money isBigMoney, a.is_first_out isFirstOut, a.created_time createdTime, a.updated_time updatedTime, a.remark, a.locker, a.lock_status lockStatus, a.lock_time lockTime, IF(a.locker = #{vo.operator}, -1, 1) lockStatus1, IF(a.lock_status = 0, 1, 2) reviewOperation, a.pay_process_status payProcessStatus, a.deposit_withdraw_address AS depositWithdrawAddress, a.recv_user_name recvUserName, a.recv_bank_code recvBankCode, a.recv_bank_name recvBankName, a.recv_bank_branch recvBankBranch, a.recv_bank_account recvBankAccount, a.recv_qr_code recvQrCode, a.file_key as fileKey, a.cash_flow_file as cashFlowFile, a.pay_tx_id payTxId, a.platform_currency_exchange_rate platformCurrencyExchangeRate, a.way_fee_amount wayFeeAmount, a.settlement_fee_amount settlementFeeAmount, a.coin_code coinCode, a.updater updater FROM agent_deposit_withdrawal a left join system_recharge_way b on a.deposit_withdraw_way_id=b.id and a.type = 1 and deposit_withdraw_channel_type='SITE_CUSTOM' and a.status in (100,101) and a.site_code =#{vo.siteCode} AND a.created_time >= #{vo.applyTimeStart} AND a.created_time <= #{vo.applyTimeEnd} AND a.status = #{vo.depositWithdrawStatus} AND a.agent_account = #{vo.agentAccount} AND a.order_no = #{vo.orderNo} and a.currency_code = #{vo.currencyCode} AND a.deposit_withdraw_way_id = #{vo.depositWithdrawWayId} ORDER BY a.created_time desc

SELECT count(a.id) FROM agent_deposit_withdrawal a and a.type = 1 and deposit_withdraw_channel_type='SITE_CUSTOM' and a.status in (100,101) and a.site_code =#{vo.siteCode} AND a.created_time >= #{vo.applyTimeStart} AND a.created_time <= #{vo.applyTimeEnd} AND a.deposit_withdraw_status = #{vo.depositWithdrawStatus} AND a.agent_account = #{vo.agentAccount} AND a.order_no = #{vo.orderNo} and a.currency_code = #{vo.currencyCode} AND a.deposit_withdraw_way_id = #{vo.depositWithdrawWayId}
